prestazioni: Engine swap to AMC's 390ci (6.4L) V8 (engine code: AMX-390) with forged internals including Eagle H-beam connecting rods (PN: CRS6125B3D), JE forged pistons (PN: 203900), and a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H hydraulic roller camshaft (PN: 32-602-8) for a 0.544" lift and 244° duration at 0.050"

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbocharger (PN: PT6766CEA) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Stainless Works (PN: SW-AMC390-EXH) and a Turbosmart Comp-Gate40 wastegate (PN: TS-0505-1001) set to 12 psi

Fuel system upgrade with Holley Dominator EFI (PN: 550-900) paired with a set of 80 lb/hr Bosch EV14 injectors (PN: 0 280 158 109), an Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump (PN: 11101), and a custom 3/8" fuel rail by Kinsler Fuel Injection (PN: 42200)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rare Spares AMC Javelin/AMX fiberglass kit (PN: RS-AMC-WB) with flared fenders to accommodate 10.5" wide Mickey Thompson ET Street R drag radials (PN: 3050) on the rear
Full custom roll cage by Chassisworks (PN: CWA-001) with a 6-point harness bar and integrated subframe connectors, powder-coated in DuPont ChromaLusion "Hugger Orange" (PN: 2010-30108)

Retro-inspired livery featuring 3M Scotchcal Graphic Film in "Gloss Black" (PN: 1080-G12) with hand-painted "A/Stock" class racing stripes by Vintage Air Graphics, replicating the original Hurst SC/Rambler design but with a modern twist
